meta.description: Tourism discovery and navigation app for Álamos, Sonora. AI-generated itineraries, maps, live events and weather.

home.lead: TrazaGo gathers what a curious traveler actually needs: AI-generated itineraries, maps with check-ins, seasonal events and quiet nudges when you're near something worth a stop.
home.trustNote: Designed in Sonora · Locally verified data
home.sectionFeaturesTitle: Everything you need, none of the noise.
home.sectionFeaturesLead: Functions tuned so discovery feels natural — not like opening yet another app.
home.f1Body: Tell Gemini what you like and get an itinerary calibrated to your time, pace and cravings.
home.f2Body: Category filters, rich markers and the option to log your visit so you carry a memory of the route.
home.f3Body: Get a note when you're near something worth your time. No invasive notifications.
home.f4Body: OpenWeather data baked into the main menu: plan without opening another app.
home.f5Body: The music festival, the open-air cinema, the workshops. Curated, not listed.
home.f6Body: Browse without creating an account. Your favorites wait if you come back.
home.sectionStoryTitle: Álamos deserves more than a generic guide.
home.sectionStoryBody: Travel apps tend to treat small towns as footnotes. TrazaGo is the opposite: a map hand-built by people who know the cobbled streets, the hour when the quarry stone turns gold, and the corners that don't show up on TripAdvisor.
home.sectionPipelineLead: Six invisible steps so your morning feels improvised.
home.step2Body: Candidates by geography, hours and rating.
home.step4Body: Order by distance, time windows and energy.
home.step5Body: Images, local tips and final metadata.
home.sectionCtaLead: Available for Android. iOS version in development.

features.title: One tool, many ways to wander.
features.lead: Every function was tested on the streets of Álamos before reaching the public version. Nothing felt right by survey — everything felt right while walking.
features.groupDiscoverBody: Find what to do today without the app pushing a sponsor.
features.groupPlanBody: Turn a vague idea into a realistic itinerary.
features.groupRememberBody: Go home with a map of what you actually lived.
features.techStackLead: Current technology, conservative decisions where it matters.

alamos.title: Álamos, Sonora.
alamos.subtitle: A Pueblo Mágico carved in quarry stone, at the edge of the desert.
alamos.intro: Founded in 1685 around the silver wealth of the Sierra Madre Occidental, Álamos preserves an Andalusian colonial architecture that almost no other northern Mexican town offers. Today it is a Pueblo Mágico, host of the Ortiz Tirado Festival, and a refuge for travelers who prefer the silence of adobe to the noise of the coast.
alamos.whatToDoLead: Three essential stops for a first visit.
alamos.place1Body: The heart of Álamos. The parish, the portals, the jacarandas. Arrive early to watch the light cross the quarry stone.
alamos.place2Body: An 18th-century house with photographic archives and objects from the mining and revolutionary eras.
alamos.place3Body: Short climb, panoramic view of the valley. At sunset, mandatory.
alamos.howToGetThereBody: The nearest airport is Ciudad Obregón (CEN), 53 km away. Direct buses run from Hermosillo and Navojoa. By car, federal highway 15 connects to the entire Mexican Pacific.

download.title: Carry Álamos in your pocket.
download.lead: TrazaGo is available for Android. The iOS version will arrive in the coming months.
download.androidBody: Current version: 1.0. Requires Android 7.0 or higher.
download.iosBody: We're finishing the iPhone version. Leave us your email and you'll be among the first to know.
download.qrBody: Point your camera at the code and the download page will open.
download.req3: Location permissions for map and geofences

contact.title: Write to us.
contact.lead: Reports, ideas, partnerships. We read every message.
contact.formNote: We'll get back to you in 2-3 business days.
contact.faq1A: Yes, completely. We don't show ads or sell data.
contact.faq2A: Partially. Favorites and previously loaded data are available offline. AI route generation requires connection.
contact.faq3A: We use Google Gemini over a locally curated catalog. AI proposes, we validate.
contact.faq4Q: Do you have an iOS version?
contact.faq4A: It's in development. Subscribe on the download page to be notified when it arrives.
contact.faq5Q: I run a hotel/shop in Álamos, can you list my place?
contact.faq5A: Write to us. Every place goes through editorial review before appearing.

footer.tagline: Made at walking pace, in Sonora.
